step_rationale: Epigenetic regulator of miR-520e and inflammatory gene expression in plaques.
mechanism: DNMT1 maintains DNA methylation patterns controlling expression of miR-520e and inflammatory mediators in atherosclerotic plaque cells.

references.title: miR-520e and its promoter region DNA methylation as potential biomarkers in atherosclerosis.
references.journal: Biochemistry and cell biology = Biochimie et biologie cellulaire
